name: Engage Messaging Twilio
description: This is an Engage specific action to send an SMS and Whatsapp messages using Twilio API

webhookUrl.description: Webhook URL that will receive all events for the sent message
webhookUrl.label: Webhook URL

twilioHostname.description: Overrides the default Twilio host name used mainly for testing without having to send real messages.
twilioHostname.label: Twilio host name

connectionOverrides.description: Connection overrides are configuration supported by twilio webhook services. Must be passed as fragments on the callback url
connectionOverrides.label: Connection Overrides

region.description: The region where the message is originating from
region.label: Region

actions.name: Send Mobile Push Notification
actions.description: Send a push notification to a mobile device using Twilio

fields.label: Content template Sid
fields.description: The template to be sent

fields.label: From
fields.description: The Push Service Sid to send the push notification from.

from.description: The Push Service Sid to send the push notification from.

fields.label: Customizations
fields.description: Customizations for the notification

title.title: Notification title
title.description: The title to be displayed for your notification

body.title: Notification body
body.description: The body to be displayed for your notification

tapAction.title: Notification open action
tapAction.description: Sets the notification click action/category: open_app, open_url, deep_link, or a custom string

link.title: Notification Link
link.description: Deep link or URL to navigate to when the notification is tapped

sound.title: Notification sound
sound.description: Sets the sound played when the notification arrives

priority.title: Notification priority
priority.description: Sets the priority of the message

badgeAmount.title: Badge amount
badgeAmount.description: The badge count which is used in combination with badge strategy to determine the final badge

badgeStrategy.title: Badge strategy
badgeStrategy.description: Sets the badge count strategy in the notification

ttl.title: Time to live
ttl.description: Sets the time to live for the notification

tapActionButtons.title: Tap action buttons
tapActionButtons.description: Sets the buttons to show when interacting with a notification

onTap.title: Tap action
onTap.description: The action to perform when this button is tapped: open_app, open_url, deep_link, or a custom string

link.title: Link
link.description: Deep link or URL to navigate to when this button is tapped
